Package neqsim.util.agentic

Class AgenticEngineeringKernel

java.lang.Object
neqsim.util.agentic.AgenticEngineeringKernel
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public final class AgenticEngineeringKernel extends Object implements Serializable
Agentic engineering kernel for planning, trust assessment, and autonomous study ranking.

The kernel provides three reusable, JSON-contract actions for agents and MCP runners:

  • plan builds an engineering intent graph and compiles it to a reviewable workflow.
  • trust builds an evidence graph and scores result credibility.
  • study ranks candidate designs against objectives and constraints.

It is intentionally deterministic and side-effect free. Simulation execution remains in the existing NeqSim runners; this class provides the planning and review substrate that agents use to call those runners consistently.

Version:
1.0
Author:
Even Solbraa
See Also:

  • Method Details

    • run

      public static String run(String json)
      Dispatches an agentic engineering action.
      Parameters:
      json - input JSON with an action field
      Returns:
      JSON response for the selected action

    • planWorkflow

      public static String planWorkflow(String json)
      Builds an engineering intent graph and compiles it to an executable workflow plan.
      Parameters:
      json - task input with task, optional objectives, constraints, standards, deliverables, and fluids
      Returns:
      JSON containing engineeringIntent, intentGraph, workflowPlan, and compiledWorkflow

    • evaluateTrust

      public static String evaluateTrust(String json)
      Builds an evidence graph and computes a transparent trust score for a result package.
      Parameters:
      json - result package with optional result, provenance, validation, qualityGate, benchmarkTrust, assumptions, limitations, standards, and evidence arrays
      Returns:
      JSON trust report with evidence graph, claims, score, verdict, and recommendations

    • runStudy

      public static String runStudy(String json)
      Runs a deterministic autonomous study ranking over candidate designs.
      Parameters:
      json - study input with candidates, objectives, and constraints
      Returns:
      JSON study report with candidate results, ranking, Pareto front, and recommendation

      Parameters:
      message - response message
      Returns:
      mutable response object

      message - human-readable error message

    • evaluateCandidates

      private static List<com.google.gson.JsonObject> evaluateCandidates(com.google.gson.JsonArray candidates, com.google.gson.JsonArray objectives, com.google.gson.JsonArray constraints, Map<String,AgenticEngineeringKernel.MetricRange> ranges)
      Evaluates all candidates.
      Parameters:
      candidates - candidate input
      objectives - objective definitions
      constraints - constraint definitions
      ranges - metric ranges
      Returns:
      evaluated candidate list

    • evaluateObjectives

      private static double evaluateObjectives(com.google.gson.JsonObject metrics, com.google.gson.JsonArray objectives, Map<String,AgenticEngineeringKernel.MetricRange> ranges, com.google.gson.JsonObject candidateOut)
      Evaluates objectives for one candidate.
      Parameters:
      metrics - candidate metrics
      objectives - objective array
      ranges - metric ranges
      candidateOut - candidate output to annotate
      Returns:
      weighted score from 0 to 100

      private static double normalizedObjective(double value, String goal, com.google.gson.JsonObject objective, AgenticEngineeringKernel.MetricRange range)
      Computes normalized objective score.
      Parameters:
      value - metric value
      goal - objective goal
      objective - objective object
      range - metric range
      Returns:
      normalized score from 0 to 1

      private static boolean isDominated(com.google.gson.JsonObject candidate, List<com.google.gson.JsonObject> evaluated, com.google.gson.JsonArray objectives)
      Checks whether a candidate is dominated.
      Parameters:
      candidate - candidate under test
      evaluated - all candidates
      objectives - objective array
      Returns:
      true if dominated by another feasible candidate

    • dominates

      private static boolean dominates(com.google.gson.JsonObject left, com.google.gson.JsonObject right, com.google.gson.JsonArray objectives)
      Checks Pareto dominance.
      Parameters:
      left - possible dominating candidate
      right - possible dominated candidate
      objectives - objective definitions
      Returns:
      true when left dominates right

    • objectiveComparison

      private static int objectiveComparison(double left, double right, String goal, double target)
      Compares two objective values.
      Parameters:
      left - left value
      right - right value
      goal - objective goal
      target - target for target goals
      Returns:
      positive when left is better, negative when worse, zero when equal

    • buildUncertaintySummary

      private static com.google.gson.JsonObject buildUncertaintySummary(List<com.google.gson.JsonObject> evaluated, com.google.gson.JsonArray objectives)
      Builds uncertainty summary from the primary objective values.
      Parameters:
      evaluated - evaluated candidates
      objectives - objectives
      Returns:
      uncertainty summary object

    • percentile

      private static double percentile(List<Double> sorted, double fraction)
      Computes percentile from sorted values.
      Parameters:
      sorted - sorted values
      fraction - percentile fraction from 0 to 1
      Returns:
      percentile value

    • buildStudyPlan

      private static com.google.gson.JsonObject buildStudyPlan(com.google.gson.JsonObject input, com.google.gson.JsonArray objectives, com.google.gson.JsonArray constraints, com.google.gson.JsonArray candidates)
      Builds study plan summary.
      Parameters:
      input - input object
      objectives - objectives
      constraints - constraints
      candidates - candidates
      Returns:
      study plan object

    • buildStudyRecommendation

      private static com.google.gson.JsonObject buildStudyRecommendation(List<com.google.gson.JsonObject> evaluated)
      Builds a final study recommendation.
      Parameters:
      evaluated - evaluated candidates sorted by rank
      Returns:
      recommendation object

    • toJsonArray

      private static com.google.gson.JsonArray toJsonArray(List<com.google.gson.JsonObject> objects)
      Converts evaluated candidate list to a JSON array.
      Parameters:
      objects - objects to convert
      Returns:
      JSON array

    • stringValue

      private static String stringValue(com.google.gson.JsonObject object, String field, String defaultValue)
      Gets string value from an object.
      Parameters:
      object - JSON object
      field - field name
      defaultValue - fallback value
      Returns:
      string value

    • numericValue

      private static double numericValue(com.google.gson.JsonObject object, String field, double defaultValue)
      Gets numeric value from an object.
      Parameters:
      object - JSON object
      field - field name
      defaultValue - fallback value
      Returns:
      numeric value

    • objectValue

      private static com.google.gson.JsonObject objectValue(com.google.gson.JsonObject object, String field, com.google.gson.JsonObject defaultValue)
      Gets object value from an object.
      Parameters:
      object - JSON object
      field - field name
      defaultValue - fallback object
      Returns:
      object value or fallback

    • arrayValue

      private static com.google.gson.JsonArray arrayValue(com.google.gson.JsonObject object, String field)
      Gets array value from an object.
      Parameters:
      object - JSON object
      field - field name
      Returns:
      array value or empty array

    • elementAsArray

      private static com.google.gson.JsonArray elementAsArray(com.google.gson.JsonElement element)
      Returns a JSON array from any JSON element.
      Parameters:
      element - source element
      Returns:
      element as array, or wrapped element

    • arrayOrDefault

      private static com.google.gson.JsonArray arrayOrDefault(com.google.gson.JsonObject input, String field, List<String> defaults)
      Copies array field or creates a default string array.
      Parameters:
      input - input object
      field - field name
      defaults - default values
      Returns:
      array value

    • stringArray

      private static com.google.gson.JsonArray stringArray(List<String> values)
      Creates a JSON string array.
      Parameters:
      values - values to add
      Returns:
      JSON array

    • stringsFromArray

      private static List<String> stringsFromArray(com.google.gson.JsonArray array)
      Converts a JSON array to strings.
      Parameters:
      array - input array
      Returns:
      string list

    • valueLabel

      private static String valueLabel(com.google.gson.JsonElement element)
      Creates a display label for a JSON value.
      Parameters:
      element - element to label
      Returns:
      display label

    • countArrayField

      private static int countArrayField(com.google.gson.JsonObject input, com.google.gson.JsonObject result, String field)
      Counts array fields in input or result.
      Parameters:
      input - input object
      result - result object
      field - field to count
      Returns:
      item count

    • round

      private static double round(double value, int decimals)
      Rounds a value to a number of decimals.
      Parameters:
      value - value to round
      decimals - number of decimals
      Returns:
      rounded value
